text: The system executed the SELL trade on TSLA due to the blended Kalman+competition weight of 0.3367, which exceeded the internal threshold, in conjunction with the Bear-Trending regime detection and a signal probability of 0.4148. At the time of execution, risk flags included a VERY LOW signal quality warning, indicating market conditions were far outside the training data, and a high drift AUC of 1.0, which explicitly flags signal degradation, although the kill switch was not triggered.
